headline: Hotel competition from alternative accommodation intensifies
summary: The global hotel industry is increasingly competitive as hotels now compete not only with each other but also with a growing range of alternative accommodation.

headline: Aaron Levie Warns 'Too Much Information' Can Derail AI Agents, Calls Data Chaos Key Enterprise Risk
summary: Aaron Levie warns AI agents need clean, structured data, says messy enterprise systems and conflicting sources are the biggest barriers.
